header.title: B Why Group Insurance Matters for Your Organization
header.description: B A Smarter Way to Care for Your Employees

benefits.title: B Enhances Employee Loyalty and Retention
benefits.description: B Build stronger relationships with your workforce through comprehensive benefits that show you care about their well-being.

benefits.title: B Demonstrates Organizational Commitment
benefits.description: B Show your dedication to employee well-being and create a positive workplace culture that attracts top talent.

benefits.title: B Reduces Financial Stress
benefits.description: B Provide peace of mind during medical or life emergencies, allowing employees to focus on their work and recovery.

benefits.title: B Strengthens Employer Branding
benefits.description: B Enhance your corporate governance and reputation as a responsible employer in the marketplace.

benefits.title: B Cost-Effective Coverage
benefits.description: B Offer comprehensive protection at lower costs compared to individual insurance policies, maximizing your benefits budget.

header.title: B Comprehensive Coverage Under One Group Policy
header.description: B Guardian Life offers a complete range of group insurance coverages that can be tailored to your organization's size, industry, and budget.

coverages.title: B Life Coverage
coverages.description: B Comprehensive life insurance including death benefits, accidental death, disability coverage, and critical illness protection for complete financial security.

coverages.title: B Health Coverage
coverages.description: B Extensive medical coverage including in-patient treatment, maternity benefits, and out-patient care for everyday medical needs.

coverages.title: B Specialized Benefits
coverages.description: B Additional coverage for dental and optical care, ensuring comprehensive healthcare support for all aspects of employee well-being.

header.title: B Life Coverage for Financial Protection & Peace of Mind
header.description: B Group Life Insurance ensures financial security for employees and their families while reinforcing an organization's commitment to long-term employee welfare. This coverage helps mitigate uncertainty and provides assurance during life-altering events

coverages.title: B Death Benefit (Natural Death)
coverages.description: B If an insured employee passes away due to natural causes during the policy period, Guardian Life Insurance, upon receiving written proof of death, will pay the sum insured to the organization or the nominated beneficiary of the employee.

coverages.title: B Accidental Death Benefit (ADB)
coverages.description: B In the event of an insured employee's death caused directly by an accident involving external and violent means, the Accidental Death Benefit provides an additional sum insured over and above the standard death benefit.

coverages.title: B Permanent & Total Disability (PTD)
coverages.description: B If an insured employee becomes permanently and totally disabled due to an accident resulting in bodily injury, Guardian Life will pay the full sum insured to the organization, offering financial support during a life-changing situation.

coverages.title: B Permanent Partial Disability (PPD)
coverages.description: B When an accident results in permanent partial disability, Guardian Life provides fixed financial benefits to the employer or employee in accordance with the Labor Law of Bangladesh, ensuring continued financial stability.

header.title: B Protection Against Major Life-Threatening Diseases
header.description: B The Critical Illness Benefit is a supplementary coverage designed to support employees and their families financially if diagnosed with any of the specified critical illnesses. This benefit helps manage high treatment costs and income disruption.

illnesses.name: B Kidney Failure (End Stage Renal Disease)
B Chronic Lung Disease / End Stage Lung Disease

header.title: B Health Coverage That Supports Everyday Medical Needs
header.description: B With rising healthcare costs and evolving family responsibilities, Guardian Life's Group Health Insurance plans are designed to provide extensive medical coverage—both for hospitalization and routine medical expenses.

plans.title: B In-Patient Treatment (IPD) Plan
plans.description: B The In-Patient Treatment plan provides financial protection for medical expenses incurred during hospitalization of at least 24 hours due to illness or accidental injury within the policy period.

plans.title: B General Out-Patient Treatment (OPD) Plan
plans.description: B The OPD plan covers medical expenses that do not require hospitalization, allowing employees to claim for routine healthcare costs.

maternity_section.title: B Supporting Employees During Life's Important Moments
maternity_section.description: B Maternity benefits offer financial assistance and peace of mind for female married employees or spouses up to 45 years of age

cards.title: B Dental Out-Patient Treatment Benefit
cards.description: B Dental OPD coverage provides access to essential dental care without hospitalization.
points: B Amalgam, Resin Plastic & Temporary/Permanent Fillings
B Root Canal Treatment (including bridging and capping)
B Scaling & Polishing (once per year per member)

cards.title: B Optical Out-Patient Treatment Benefit
cards.description: B Optical OPD benefits cover eye care and vision correction needs on an outpatient basis.
points: B Vision Tests for Refractive Errors
